lint.output: 5 pre-existing warnings in unrelated files (flow-canvas.tsx, journey-canvas-view.tsx, sidebar.tsx) — documented in LEARNINGS.md as known acceptable

notes: Added ARIA accessibility to the perspective color picker in PerspectiveRow. Changes: (1) Added PERSPECTIVE_COLOR_NAMES map for human-readable color names. (2) Added focusedColorIndex state + triggerRef + swatchRefs to PerspectiveRow. (3) Added focus-management useEffect (focuses the right swatch when picker opens or arrow key changes index). (4) Added openColorPicker (sets focusedColorIndex to current color, opens picker), closeColorPicker (closes + returns focus to trigger), handlePickerKeyDown (ArrowLeft/Right/Up/Down cycle through swatches, Escape closes). (5) Trigger button: added ref, aria-haspopup=listbox, aria-expanded, updated aria-label to include current color name. (6) Popup div: added role=listbox, aria-label=Select a color, onKeyDown handler. (7) Swatch buttons: added ref callback, role=option, aria-selected, aria-label with color name, tabIndex (roving tabindex pattern), updated onClick to use closeColorPicker.
